name: RackStop 1.25
description: Meet RackStop, the best addition you can make to your biking toolkit. This simple addition to any 1.25in receiver hitch rack will get you to the trails faster with no more frustration. Set it once and enjoy faster, smoother, effortless installation of your bike or cargo rack every time. It is a simple as install the RackStop to any rack stem, install the rack as usual, then set the rackstop against the receiving hitch and tighten the bolt. Never again spend time or energy on aligning the holes to insert your hitch pin. The RackStop is made of high quality industrial materials that can withstand high temperatures, UV exposure, and will last forever no matter what you put it through. Install once, enjoy effortless pin allignment every time! For 1.25in hitch receiver systems.
